$documentation_envVars: POSTGRES_URL    — auto-set when you attach a Neon/Postgres DB in Vercel Storage
RESEND_FROM_EMAIL — e.g. 'CM2 Camp <onboarding@resend.dev>' (must be verified domain)
FRONTEND_URL    — your live URL, e.g. https://cm2-camp.vercel.app
See .env.example for full details. Set these in Vercel → Settings → Environment Variables.
